techniques.name: Personal Camouflage
techniques.subtitle: Disrupt your outline and blend in

steps.helpDetail: The head-and-shoulders outline is instantly recognizable. Use vegetation or a poncho to distort your shape.

steps.instruction: Match the background texture and color.
steps.helpDetail: Use mud, charcoal, or crushed leaves to darken skin. Match vertical lines in forests, horizontal lines in grass.
Movement attracts the eye 10x faster than color. Freeze when observed.

steps.instruction: Block the door from the inside.
steps.helpDetail: Use heavy furniture. Wedge a chair under the doorknob. The heavier the better.
The doorway is where fire is concentrated. Position yourself in a corner out of the line of fire.

steps.instruction: Cover windows and turn off lights.
steps.helpDetail: Deny visual information to anyone outside. Silence creates uncertainty.

steps.instruction: Choose an interior room with few windows.
steps.helpDetail: Ideally above ground floor (some gases sink) but not the roof. Bathroom or large closet works.

steps.instruction: Tape plastic sheeting over windows, doors, and vents.
steps.helpDetail: Use duct tape and heavy plastic (garbage bags work). Creates a temporary airlock.
